heading_content_part: Use of the GoChat Messenger ApplicationThese Terms governs your use of the Services.
Your Contacts

In order to access and use the features of the Services, you acknowledge and agree that you will have to provide GoChat Messenger with your mobile phone number. You expressly acknowledge and agree that GoChat Messenger may periodically access your contact list and/or address book on your mobile device to find and keep track of mobile phone numbers of other users of the Services. When providing GoChat Messenger with your mobile phone number, you must provide accurate and complete information. By subscribing for and using the Services, you hereby give your express consent to GoChat Messenger to use the mobile phone numbers you provide to access and use the Services. You should not use another person’s phone number without their permission.

You can use the contact upload feature and, if permitted by applicable laws, provide us with the mobile phone numbers in your address book on a regular basis, including those of users of our Services and your other contacts. If any of your contacts aren’t yet using our Services, we’ll manage this information for you in a way that ensures those contacts cannot be identified by us.

You will not use the Services for any purpose that is unlawful or prohibited, or otherwise not intended by Etisalat, including, by way of example, and not as limitation:(a) in any way that is false, inaccurate, or misleading;(b) in any way that is disruptive;(c) to attempt to restrict another user from using or enjoying the GoChat Messenger or to encourage or facilitate violations of these Terms or the GoChat Messenger Privacy Policy;

(d) (g) to post or transmit, or cause to be posted or transmitted, any content on the GoChat Messenger that is libellous, defamatory, obscene, pornographic, abusive, offensive, profane, violent or that infringes any copyright or other right of any person;(e) for any unlawful purposes or in any fashion that is not permitted under applicable laws;(f) to reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the GoChat Messenger;

(g) to introduce or permit the introduction of any computer code, file, or program that may damage the Services or Etisalat’s network and information systems.You shall not:(a) copy, modify, duplicate, create derivative works from, frame, mirror, republish, download, display, transmit, or distribute all or any portion of the Services in any form or media or by any means; or

(b) de-compile, reverse compile, disassemble, reverse engineer or otherwise reduce to human-perceivable form all or any part of the Services; or(c) access all or any part of the Services in order to build a product or service which competes with the Services; or(d) use the Services to provide services to third parties; or(e) license, sell, rent, lease, transfer, assign, distribute, display, disclose, or otherwise commercially exploit, or otherwise make the Services available to any third party; or

ident_heading: GoChat GPT Feature – Terms of Use
heading_content_part: GoChat GPT Feature – Terms of UseThe GPT Feature (the“Feature”) used in GoChat Messenger is provided through “Azure OpenAI” Feature from Microsoft.
Access:you must comply with GoChat Messenger minimum age requirement to use this Feature.
Usage Requirements:you may access this Feature following the GoChat Messenger General Terms of Use and stated conditions.

Personal Data:by accessing this Feature you acknowledge to share or insert your personal data voluntary for the provision of the Feature and the Service and consent to all actions taken by Etisalat in connection with the processing of your personal data, in accordance with applicable laws and Etisalat Privacy Policy available athttps://www.gochatapp.net/en/privacy-policy.html

Content:(a) Your Content.You may provide input to the Feature (“Input”) and receive the output generated and returned by the feature based on the Input (“Output”). GoChat Messenger will consider Input and Output collectively as (“Content”).Subject to your compliance with the general terms and conditions of GoChat Messenger and to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, you own all Input you provide. As long as you adhere to these Terms, you can use Content for any purpose, including commercial purposes such as selling or publishing it.

You also agree that GoChat Messenger Azure OpenAI and other related third parties may use the Content to provide and maintain the Features, comply with applicable law and enforce our policies. You are responsible for Content by ensuring its does not violate applicable law or these Terms.(b)

Similarity of ContentDue to the nature of machine learning, Output may not be unique across users, and the Feature may generate the same or similar Output for GoChat Messenger or third parties. Responses requested by and generated for other users, are not considered your Content.(c)

decoder_heading: Use of Content to improve Feature
ident_heading: Use of Content to improve Feature
heading_content_part: Use of Content to improve FeatureWe reserve the right to use Content to develop or improve the feature.(d)

AccuracyArtificial intelligence and machine learning are rapidly evolving fields of study. Consistent efforts are made to improve the Feature and make it more accurate, reliable, safe and beneficial.Given the probabilistic nature of machine learning, using this Feature may in some situations, result inaccurate or incorrect Output that does not accurately reflect real people, places or facts, you should evaluate the accuracy of any Output as appropriate for your use case, including by using a human review of the Output.
We recommend that you evaluate the accuracy of any Output as appropriate for your use case.(e)
Links to other websites

The Feature may provide links to other websites and apps not operated or controlled by GoChat Messenger, Azure OpenAI Service affiliated and partners, including social media services (“Third Party Sites”). The information that you share with Third Party sites will be governed by the specific privacy policies and terms of service of the Third-Party sites and not by this Privacy Policy, by providing these links through the Feature, GoChat Messenger does not claim to endorse or have reviewed these sites, please contact the Third-Party sites directly for information on their privacy practices and policies
